price_note: Site states "Viking Month Access" at "$55/ MONTH" (plus "$40 1x time enrollment"), a "Personal Trainer Membership" at "$249/ MONTH" (for trainers only, not clients), and a "1 Day Access Pass" at "$25/ day".
